shortDescription: Stir-fried chicken with peanuts and dried chilies.
orderTip: Ask for 'wei la' (slightly spicy) if you prefer mild heat.

shortDescription: Spicy tofu in a fiery, savory sauce.
orderTip: Very spicy. Order with rice to balance the heat.
jaDescription: 火照るほど辛く、風味豊かなソースの豆腐料理。

shortDescription: Sliced pork belly stir-fried with vegetables.
orderTip: Rich and savory. Great with steamed rice.
jaDescription: 野菜と共に炒めた豚バラ肉の薄切り。
jaOrderTip: 濃厚で風味豊か。白ご飯に最適です。

shortDescription: Tender beef in a super spicy, oily broth.
orderTip: Extremely spicy. For chili lovers only.
jaDescription: 超辛く、油っぽいスープの中の柔らかい牛肉。
jaOrderTip: 極めて辛いです。唐辛子好きな方限定。

englishName: Sliced Beef and Ox Tongue in Chili Sauce
shortDescription: Chilled sliced offal in a spicy, numbing sauce.
orderTip: A cold appetizer. Spicy and flavorful.
jaDescription: 辛く痺れるソースで和えた冷たい臓物の薄切り。
jaOrderTip: 冷たい前菜です。辛くて風味豊かです。

shortDescription: Sweet, sour, and spicy shredded pork stir-fry.
orderTip: Flavorful, not too spicy. Good for beginners.
jaDescription: 甘酸っぱく、辛い豚肉の細切り炒め。

shortDescription: Crispy fried chicken buried in dried chilies.
orderTip: Very spicy. Eat around the chilies.
jaDescription: 唐辛子の山に埋もれたパリパリのフライドチキン。
jaOrderTip: 非常に辛いです。唐辛子を避けて食べましょう。

shortDescription: Noodles in a spicy, savory sesame sauce.
orderTip: A classic street food noodle dish. Rich and flavorful.
jaDescription: 辛く風味豊かな胡麻ソースのかかった麺。
jaOrderTip: 定番の屋台麺です。濃厚で風味豊か。

shortDescription: Pork dumplings in a sweet and spicy sauce.
orderTip: A snack or appetizer. Sauce is sweet and spicy.
jaDescription: 甘辛いソースの豚肉餃子。

shortDescription: Cold poached chicken in a spicy, tangy sauce.
orderTip: A cold appetizer. Sauce is flavorful and spicy.
jaDescription: 辛酸っぱいソースの冷たい茹で鶏。

englishName: Mao Xue Wang (Spicy Duck Blood Curd)
shortDescription: A spicy hotpot-style dish with various meats.
orderTip: Very spicy and adventurous. Contains offal.

shortDescription: Sliced pork belly with a strong garlic sauce.

shortDescription: Spicy glass noodles with ground pork.

jaDescription: ひき肉と豆板醤で味付けした、辛い春雨料理。

shortDescription: Dry-fried mix of meats and vegetables, very spicy.

englishName: Bo Bo Chicken (Skewers in Chili Oil)

shortDescription: Sweet and savory braised pork belly, not spicy.

shortDescription: Fermented tofu, deep-fried and served with sauce.
